errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {{size}}MB.
errors.unsupportedType: The file you uploaded is not supported. Please upload a PDF, Word document, or an image file.

signature.title: Create Your Signature
signature.instructions: Draw your signature in the box below using your mouse or touchscreen. You can use this signature to sign documents later.

documentSign.title: Sign Your Document
documentSign.instructions: Drag the signature to position it, or use the corner handles to resize it. Then click "Sign & Download".
documentSign.success: Document signed successfully! The file has been downloaded.

errors.noSignature: Please create your signature first before signing documents.
errors.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a PDF or image file.

install.title: Add to Home Screen
install.message: Install this app for quick access from your home screen.
install.iosInstructions: Tap the Share button then Add to Home Screen to install.
